name: The San-in Godo Bank,Ltd.
summary: The San-in Godo Bank, Ltd. provides various banking products and services for individuals and corporate customers in Japan. The company operates in two segments, Banking and Leasing. It offers deposits and loans; and leasing, currency exchange, and securities investment services. The company also provides real estate leasing and credit guarantee services; collection, delivery, and sorting and safekeeping services for cash/checks; maintenance and management services for ATMs; and bad loan collection services. In addition, it offers public fund and account transfer services; and services for card member stores. Further, the company provides consulting services on the acquisition, safekeeping, and sale of securities, as well as corporate diagnosis and management consulting services. As of March 31, 2019, it operated 81 branches and 69 sub-branches in Tokyo and Osaka, as well as representative offices in Dalian, Shanghai, and Bangkok. The San-in Godo Bank, Ltd. was founded in 1878 and is headquartered in Matsue, Japan.
